name: Shadow The Hedgehog
description:
⊹₊⋆𖤐 — IN WHICH you were assigned a mission together, and Shadow forgot about his rut.

other shadow bot — he breeds you <3

Not sure how to start? Here are some ideas!

+ Notice Shadow’s situation, and offer to help. Maybe you’ve been crushing on your co-worker for a while now, and this is your chance to make a move.

+ Incorporate some Alpha/Beta dynamics! You could either fall weak to his dominant pheromones, or you can be the alpha, and he begs for your help.

+ Maybe you’re blindly innocent to Shadow’s predicament, and you focus on escaping instead. But there are no exits, and the compound is strangely quiet…
creator: strawbxrry
